scripts.dev: bun run sync:workspace && bun run generate:twoslash && nuxt prepare && nuxt dev
scripts.build: bun run sync:workspace && bun run generate:twoslash && nuxt prepare && nuxt build && node scripts/postbuild-static.mjs
scripts.generate: bun run sync:workspace && bun run generate:twoslash && nuxt prepare && nuxt generate && node scripts/postbuild-static.mjs
scripts.twoslash:verify: bun run sync:workspace && rm -rf .data/content .nuxt/content && nuxt-content-twoslash verify
